saved_queries.name: All Following (current owner)
saved_queries.sql_text: SELECT * FROM profiles WHERE owner_username = ? AND is_following = 1;

saved_queries.name: All Followers (mutual + imported)
saved_queries.sql_text: SELECT * FROM profiles WHERE owner_username = ? AND is_follower = 1;

saved_queries.name: Mutual Friends
saved_queries.sql_text: SELECT * FROM profiles WHERE owner_username = ? AND is_following = 1 AND is_follower = 1;

saved_queries.name: Blocked Users
saved_queries.sql_text: SELECT * FROM profiles WHERE owner_username = ? AND is_blocked = 1;

saved_queries.name: Verified Accounts I Follow
saved_queries.sql_text: SELECT owner_username, username, displayName, followerCount, followingCount, heartCount, videoCount, avatar FROM profiles WHERE owner_username = ? AND is_following = 1 AND verified = 1;

saved_queries.name: Most Followed Profiles (Top 50)
saved_queries.sql_text: SELECT username, displayName, followerCount FROM profiles WHERE owner_username = ? ORDER BY followerCount DESC LIMIT 50;

saved_queries.name: Profiles with Zero or Low Following
saved_queries.sql_text: SELECT username, displayName, followingCount FROM profiles WHERE owner_username = ? AND followingCount <= 10 ORDER BY followingCount ASC;

saved_queries.name: Recently Followed (Last 30 Days)
saved_queries.sql_text: SELECT * FROM profiles WHERE owner_username = ? AND following_date >= date('now', '-30 days') ORDER BY following_date DESC;

saved_queries.name: Follower Growth Opportunity (Following me but I dont follow back)
saved_queries.sql_text: SELECT username, displayName, followerCount FROM profiles WHERE owner_username = ? AND is_follower = 1 AND is_following = 0;

saved_queries.name: Failed Fetches
saved_queries.sql_text: SELECT username, error FROM profiles WHERE owner_username = ? AND status = 'failed';

saved_queries.name: Fetch Completion History
saved_queries.sql_text: SELECT * FROM fetch_meta WHERE owner_username = ? ORDER BY completed_at DESC;
